questions.questionText:
Match the following heart valves with their correct anatomical locations:

Column I:
(a) Tricuspid valve
(b) Bicuspid (Mitral) valve
(c) Pulmonary valve
(d) Aortic valve

Column II:
(i) Between left ventricle and aorta
(ii) Between right atrium and right ventricle
(iii) Between right ventricle and pulmonary artery
(iv) Between left atrium and left ventricle

Choose the correct option below:
